impact: This breaks the current syntax-preflight loop by giving the worker deterministic recovery guidance after four failed or empty proposal rounds: one narrow fixture-first file set, complete JSON replacements only, no live DevHub sessions, and no broad contract rewrites or domain-task implementation.
summary: Add a tiny syntax-safe repeated no-accepted-patch guardrail helper plus a daemon-local synthetic self-test.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 25 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
